decision.overall_recommendation: VIX gate is open, so new entries are permissible, but this batch is Technology-heavy (BB, BTDR, CORZ all Tech) which creates sector concentration risk among the picks themselves — existing Webull positions are tagged 'Unknown' sector so a clean cross-check isn't possible, but avoid stacking all three simultaneously. BB is the standout (SmartScore 97, tight bullish alignment, confirmed Double Bottom breakout) though it's run well past its volume-profile value area, so treat it as a momentum add rather than a value entry. BTDR and AVTR carry a negative ML edge flag that tempers otherwise clean-looking technical setups — per the ML track record, sample size is currently insufficient to judge the model's reliability, so take these edge calls at face value rather than dismissing them. CIFR and CORZ both carry a bearish Double Top pattern flag (CIFR: 'Avoid long' action; CORZ: 'already breaking down') that directly contradicts their pullback/long setups and should be weighted heavily against chasing the SmartScore alone. Account equity is small ($1,710.83) so position sizes are naturally modest (1% risk ≈ $17/trade); no existing open orders overlap with any of these tickers. Pick-track-record sample size is also insufficient this run, so no calibration adjustment to conviction was applied beyond the setup-specific flags below.
